sections.title: Section 1
sections.text: This section demonstrates regular flow content before a forced page break. It includes enough text to occupy space and make the break behavior visible in print output.

sections.title: Section 2
sections.text: This section intentionally starts on a new page using break-before: page. Content here verifies that block-level elements can be moved to a fresh page in paged media mode.

sections.title: Section 3
sections.text: This section contains nested blocks with break-inside: avoid, useful for keeping cards or critical groups together and reducing awkward split content.
